title: Shijing: Dong Shan (The Eastern Mountain)
description: From the Shijing (Book of Songs) — the oldest collection of Chinese poetry, compiled by Confucius from songs of the Zhou dynasty.
introduction: From the Shijing (Book of Songs) — the oldest collection of Chinese poetry, compiled by Confucius from songs of the Zhou dynasty.

translation.text: We went to the eastern mountain. Long were we there without coming back. We came from the east; down poured the rain incessantly. We were in the east, and our hearts were in the west. There were our clothes that we made for ourselves.
